Medical Devices - New regulations # Medical Devices - New regulations [Overview](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations/overview_en) The EU has revised the legal framework of 3 directives to reflect progress over the last 20 years. [Getting ready](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations/getting-ready-new-regulations_en) Information for actors active in the medical devices sector [Guidance](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations/guidance_en) The European Commission provides a range of guidance documents to assist stakeholders in implementing the medical devices regulations.These are… [](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations_en) ## Latest updates * News announcement * 18 May 2026 [New Implementing Regulation sets out uniform requirements for conformity assessment and notified bodies](https://ec.europa.eu/newsroom/sante/newsletter-archives/75370) 1 min read * News announcement * 5 May 2026 [Implementing Regulation (EU) 2026/977 – uniform requirements for conformity assessment and notified bodies (Annex VII)](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg_impl/2026/977/oj) 1 min read * News announcement * 18 March 2026 [Recording available - Commissioner Várhelyi to open high-level event on medical devices](https://health.ec.europa.eu/events/medical-devices-innovation-and-patient-safety-2026-03-16_en) 1 min read * News announcement * 13 March 2026 [Commissioner Várhelyi to open high-level event on medical devices](https://ec.europa.eu/newsroom/sante/newsletter-archives/73104) 1 min read [See all](https://ec.europa.eu/health/medical-devices-new-regulations/latest-updates_en) [](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations_en) ## Highlights ![Image 3](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2022-08/md_ivd_laboratories.png?h=252f27fa&itok=K7uztOPc) * News announcement * 5 August 2022 [Call for EU reference laboratories sent to Member States](https://health.ec.europa.eu/latest-updates/call-eu-reference-laboratories-sent-member-states-2022-08-05_en) 1 min read ![Image 4](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2022-07/20220705_md_hl_.jpg?h=252f27fa&itok=6gTHWdHB) [Benchmarks for high-risk diagnostics](https://health.ec.europa.eu/latest-updates/commission-implementing-regulation-eu-20221107-4-july-2022-laying-down-common-specifications-2022-07-05_en) ![Image 5](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2022-06/20220621_hl-eu-labs-high-risk-diag.jpg?h=252f27fa&itok=-GgD5Zrn) * News announcement * 21 June 2022 [Setting the scene for EU reference labs for high-risk diagnostics](https://health.ec.europa.eu/latest-updates/setting-scene-eu-reference-labs-high-risk-diagnostics-2022-06-21_en) 1 min read ![Image 6: 26 May 2022, the Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices is applicable within the EU](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2022-06/202205_ivdr.jpg?itok=fs4zUhz2) [26 May 2022, the Regulation (EU) 2017/746 on In Vitro Diagnostic Medical Devices is applicable within the EU](https://health.ec.europa.eu/medical-devices-new-regulations/overview_en) ![Image 7](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2021-12/md_sector_hl_ec-logo.jpg?h=f2329d93&itok=3XHCynem) * News announcement * 26 May 2021 [Notice to Stakeholders: Status of the EU-Switzerland Mutual Recognition Agreement (MRA) for medical devices](https://health.ec.europa.eu/latest-updates/notice-stakeholders-status-eu-switzerland-mutual-recognition-agreement-mra-medical-devices-2021-05-26_en) 1 min read ![Image 8](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2021-12/md_sector_hl_state-of-play.jpg?h=f2329d93&itok=ppuHj2tW) * General publications * 10 July 2020 [State of play of Joint implementation Plan on actions considered necessary to ensure the sound functioning of the new framework for medical devices under the MDR](https://health.ec.europa.eu/latest-updates/state-play-joint-implementation-plan-actions-considered-necessary-ensure-sound-functioning-new-2020-07-10_en) 1 min read ![Image 9](https://health.ec.europa.eu/sites/default/files/styles/oe_theme_ratio_3_2_medium/public/2021-12/md_sector_hl_udi-helpdesk.jpg?h=f2329d93&itok=jGh2zwrz) [The UDI Helpdesk is live.
